name: Vanilla Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, heat the corn oil over high heat until it smokes.
2. Add 1 kernel of popping corn and heat until the kernel pops.
3. Add the vanilla bean and the rest of the popping corn to the pot.
4. Cover the pot and gently shake it until the popping starts.
5. Vigorously shake the pot until the popping slows down significantly.
6. Remove from heat and remove the vanilla bean.
7. Toss the popcorn with sugar, salt, and melted butter.
8. Scrape the seeds from the vanilla bean and add them to the popcorn.
